forbiddenSubstitutions: assertedAt must not replace occurrenceTime when the event occurred earlier
effectiveFrom must not be inferred from assertedAt without policy
rules.delayedSyncRule: Delayed sync must preserve occurrenceTime separately from assertedAt and sync/capture evidence.
rules.highConsequenceUseRule: High-consequence outputs require event/effective time basis plus review or accepted-consequence trace when applicable.

forbiddenSubstitutions: review time must not replace execution time
rules.delayedSyncRule: Offline capture and later sync must not collapse capture, occurrence, assertion, and review time.
rules.highConsequenceUseRule: Accepted execution output requires reviewed execution interval and evidence sufficiency.

forbiddenSubstitutions: observation report time must not replace phenomenonTime
rules.delayedSyncRule: Delayed observation entry must retain the observed phenomenon time.
rules.highConsequenceUseRule: Treatment decision reconstruction must retain observation time and source/evidence time.

forbiddenSubstitutions: materializedAt must not become event time or accepted execution time
rules.delayedSyncRule: Late-arriving evidence must invalidate or review stale materialization when policy requires it.
rules.highConsequenceUseRule: PassportView input must verify materialization freshness before output.

notes: The matrix is an executable companion target for conformance runners; baseline temporal law remains in RC2.1.
